name: Gingerbread People
recipeIngredient: if using self-rising flour, omit baking soda and salt.
recipeInstructions:
Mix brown sugar, shortening, molasses, and water. Stir in remaining ingredients. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
Heat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Grease cookie sheet lightly. Roll about 1/4 of the dough 1/4-inch thick on a floured board. Cut with a floured gingerbread cutter or other favorite cutter. Place cookies about 2 inches apart on the cookie sheet. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until no indentation remains when touched; cool.
Decorate with colored frosting, colored sugar, and candies if desired. Makes about 2-1/2 dozen 2-1/2-inch cookies; 185 calories per cookie.
